messages.content: 翻译“2021年登陆中国 加入百威大家族 占据高端啤酒顶端地位”为英文
"Landing in China in 2021 and joining the Budweiser family, occupying the top position in the high-end beer market."
翻译“拥有悠久历史 坐拥国际地位”为英文
"Boasting a rich history and enjoying an international status."
翻译“源自1876，风靡全球150多个国家”为英文
"Originating from 1876, loved in more than 150 countries worldwide."
翻译“风靡全球150多个国家”为英文
"Popular in over 150 countries worldwide."
翻译“百威黑金 定位于百威家族高端品牌”为英文
"Budweiser Black Gold is positioned as a high-end brand within the Budweiser family."
翻译“百威母品牌”为英文
"The parent brand of Budweiser."
翻译“百威初创品牌”为英文
"The flagship brand of Budweiser."
翻译“区域扩张”为英文
"Regional expansion"
翻译“带动区域营收增量及消费者升级”为英文
"Driving regional revenue growth and consumer upgrading"
翻译“啤酒老饕”为英文
"Beer connoisseur"
翻译“兄弟酒局”为英文
"Brotherhood of alcohol"
